- [Main](https://www.ashansenlab.com/) - [Team](https://www.ashansenlab.com/team.html) - [Research](https://www.ashansenlab.com/research.html) - [News](https://www.ashansenlab.com/news.html) - [Publications](https://www.ashansenlab.com/publications.html) - [Tools](https://www.ashansenlab.com/tools.html) - [Join](https://www.ashansenlab.com/join.html) - [Values](https://www.ashansenlab.com/values.html) - [Data](https://www.ashansenlab.com/data.html) - [Code](https://www.ashansenlab.com/code.html) - [Reagents](https://www.ashansenlab.com/reagents.html) - [Contact](https://www.ashansenlab.com/contact.html) | | | | --- | --- | | ## [Welcome to James Drayton](https://www.ashansenlab.com/news/welcome-to-james-drayton) 1/11/2022 | | | | --- | --- | | ![Picture](https://www.ashansenlab.com/uploads/1/2/5/3/125335035/20210729-224716_orig.jpg) | We are thrilled to welcome James Drayton to the lab.
Jamie is a first year graduate student in MIT's Biological Engineering program.
Jamie previously completed their undergraduate degree in Chemical-Biological Engineering at MIT, and will be figuring out how the 3D genome works and functions in the lab.
Welcome Jamie! | Comments are closed. | ## Archives
